summary.summary: Update Config.xcconfig to bump APP_DEV_VERSION from 0.8.4.11 to 0.8.4.12 (diff:97469a535394, file:169714b78f81). The commit message indicates this is a CI/dev version bump (commit:e9c000814d93).
